zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel De Kirketon於1239年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓時，她的父親SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon64歲，母親Dionysia de Sancto Paulo64歲。她於1265年與William de Staunton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1312年在她的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel De Kirketon于1239年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓时，她的父亲SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon64岁，母亲Dionysia de Sancto Paulo64岁。她于1265年与William de Staunton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1312年在她的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kirketon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish: locative name from any of numerous places in Scotland so called, named as ‘church settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel De Kirketon was born in 1239, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon, was 64 and her mother, Dionysia de Sancto Paulo, was 64. She married William de Staunton in 1265, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1312, in her hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel De Kirketon est née en 1239, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Dionysia de Sancto Paulo, avait 64 ans. Elle a épousé William de Staunton en 1265, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1312, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel De Kirketon 1239 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon 64 und ihre Mutter Dionysia de Sancto Paulo 64. Sie hat 1265 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom William de Staunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1312 im Alter von 73 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Kirketon è nata il nel 1239 nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon, aveva 64 anni e sua madre, Dionysia de Sancto Paulo, aveva 64 anni. Lei sposato William de Staunton nel 1265, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1312, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel De Kirketonが1239年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで生まれた時，父SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketonは64歳，母Dionysia de Sancto Pauloは64歳であった。1265年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでWilliam de Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1312年に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel De Kirketon(이)가 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon(은)는 64세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dionysia de Sancto Paulo(은)는 64세였다. 그녀는 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 William de Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 그녀의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel De Kirketon nasceu em 1239, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Dionysia de Sancto Paulo, tinha 64 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Staunton em 1265, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1312, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel De Kirketon родилась в 1239 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Dionysia de Sancto Paulo, 64. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Staunton в 1265 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1312 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel De Kirketon nació en 1239, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, SIR ALEXANDER BOZON, Knight De Kirketon, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Dionysia de Sancto Paulo, tenía 64 años. Se casó con William de Staunton en 1265, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1312, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
